Photo by charlesdeluvio on UnsplashAfter reviewing multiple interview experiences shared across Capgemini, Wipro, HCLTech, NTT DATA, Mindtree, Deloitte, PwC, Cognizant, Accenture, Infosys and Barclays, these are some of the most frequently asked questions for Java Backend Developer roles.
Questions 1–40
◆ How does HashMap work internally in Java 8, and what happens during a collision?
◆ What is the difference between HashMap and ConcurrentHashMap?
◆ Why should equals() and hashCode() be overridden together?
◆ What problems can occur if hashCode() is not implemented correctly?
◆ Why is String immutable in Java?
◆ What is the difference between String, StringBuilder, and StringBuffer?
◆ How does the String Constant Pool work internally?
◆ What is the difference between Heap Memory and Stack Memory?
◆ What is the difference between final, finally, and finalize()?
◆ When would you choose an Abstract Class over an Interface?
◆ What is the difference between method overloading and method overriding?
